plan.caption:
Three cards. One continuous ocean painted across all of them.

Naoyo Kimura illustrated the Southern Islands set as a single connected scene, and Tentacruel, Marill, and Lapras share the same stretch of water. Most collectors own one. Few realize all three lock together into a full panorama.

Tentacruel: $43. Marill: $132. Lapras: $63. Combined panorama value: $238, for a piece of 2000-era promo art that was only available in a mail-order set shipped with a Topps movie collection.

pokeev.com tracks the live market on every Southern Islands card so you know exactly where each one sits before you buy or sell.

Save this for when you are hunting Southern Islands singles and need a verified price anchor.

Which of the three do you already own? Drop it below.

Follow @pokeev.tcg for live Expected Value on sealed product and singles every week.
Link in bio -> pokeev.com

qa_warnings: slide 2: Card name 'Tentacruel' is partially cut off in the top-left of the card image on slide 1 (visible as 'Tentacrue'), but on slide 2 the full card renders correctly — no issue here
slide 3: Card text body is heavily obscured and unreadable due to the holographic foil overlay making the attack text, stats, and flavor text illegible
slide 5: Card names below the three cards are missing — only prices ($43, $132, $63) appear, but no Tentacruel, Marill, and Lapras labels to identify which price belongs to which card
